title: Bob scan timeout swallows scan_to_tip errors as panics
description: In e2e_testnet.rs lines 489-493, the Bob scan runs inside a timeout with an inner .expect() on scan_to_tip(). If scan_to_tip() returns Err, the inner .expect() panics inside the async block. That panic propagates as a task panic rather than a clean test failure, obscuring the actual scan error. Fix: pass scan_to_tip() directly to timeout() and chain the two .expect() calls at the call site, which keeps the Elapsed case and the scan error case distinct and produces readable output for both.
